description: 🤬 Russia has moved the Bastion missile complex near Kursk: the approach time of the Zircons and Onyx to Kyiv can be reduced to a few minutes, - the monitoring channel Bastion is a mobile coastal missile complex, originally intended for the destruction of ships. It can launch supersonic Onyx missiles, and after modernization - hypersonic Zircons. "Onyx" develops speed...
description_en: 🤬 Russia has moved the Bastion missile complex near Kursk: the approach time of the Zircons and Onyx to Kyiv can be reduced to a few minutes, - the monitoring channel Bastion is a mobile coastal missile complex, originally intended for the destruction of ships. It can launch supersonic Onyx missiles, and after modernization - hypersonic Zircons. "Onyx" develops speed...
description_uk: 🤬 россия перебросила ракетный комплекс "Бастион" под Курск: время подлета "Цирконов" и "Ониксов" к Киеву может сократиться до нескольких минут, - мониторинговые канал "Бастион" - это мобильный береговой ракетный комплекс, изначально предназначенный для уничтожения кораблей. Он может запускать сверхзвуковые ракеты "Оникс", а после модернизации - гиперзвуковые "Цирконы". "Оникс" развивает скорость...

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
title_uk: Атака нападу
description: There was a report from our intelligence: we received data, including from the American and European partners, about the Russians' preparation for an attack using the "hazelnut". We are checking this information. We see signs of preparations for a combined attack on the territory of Ukraine, in particular on Kyiv, with the use of various weapons. The specified medium-range weapon can be in such a strike. It is important to react consciously...
description_en: There was a report from our intelligence: we received data, including from the American and European partners, about the Russians' preparation for an attack using the "hazelnut". We are checking this information. We see signs of preparations for a combined attack on the territory of Ukraine, in particular on Kyiv, with the use of various weapons. The specified medium-range weapon can be in such a strike. It is important to react consciously...
description_uk: Була доповідь нашої розвідки: отримали дані в тому числі від американських та європейських партнерів про підготовку росіянами удару із застосуванням «орєшніка». Перевіряємо цю інформацію. Бачимо ознаки підготовки комбінованого удару по території України, зокрема по Києву, із застосуванням різного озброєння. Вказане озброєння середньої дальності може бути в такому ударі. Важливо свідомо реагувати...

title: Today is the day of one of the strongest and truly proud components...

description: Today is the day of one of the strongest and truly proud components of the Defense Forces - Marine Corps Day. Soldiers who showed themselves extremely bravely in this war for Ukrainian independence. He awarded the soldiers with state awards, as well as battle flags, ribbons of the "For Courage and Courage" and honorary titles of military formations of the marine corps. Thank you, warriors, and everyone...
description_en: Today is the day of one of the strongest and truly proud components of the Defense Forces - Marine Corps Day. Soldiers who showed themselves extremely bravely in this war for Ukrainian independence. He awarded the soldiers with state awards, as well as battle flags, ribbons of the "For Courage and Courage" and honorary titles of military formations of the marine corps. Thank you, warriors, and everyone...
description_uk: Сьогодні день однієї з найбільш сильних та справді гордих складових Сил оборони – День морської піхоти. Воїни, які проявили себе надзвичайно сміливо в цій війні за українську незалежність. Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів, також бойовими прапорами, стрічками почесної відзнаки «За мужність та відвагу» та почесними найменуваннями військові формування морської піхоти. Дякую вам, воїни, та всім...

Москва может усовершенствовать системы уклонения от украинских дронов-перехватчиков, а также пытаться внедрять контрмеры: "Например, РЭБ на "Шахедах" или другие...

description: Update: Ukraine hits major chemical plant in Perm Krai, fuel terminal in Novorossiysk, authorities say. President Volodymyr Zelensky confirmed that Ukraine's Security Service (SBU) had struck the Metafrax Chemicals plant in Perm Krai, located around 1,700 kilometers (1,050 miles) from the Ukrainian border. According to Zelensky, production at the facility has been halted following the strike.
description_en: Update: Ukraine hits major chemical plant in Perm Krai, fuel terminal in Novorossiysk, authorities say. President Volodymyr Zelensky confirmed that Ukraine's Security Service (SBU) had struck the Metafrax Chemicals plant in Perm Krai, located around 1,700 kilometers (1,050 miles) from the Ukrainian border. According to Zelensky, production at the facility has been halted following the strike.

description: "Donald Trump" will soon be put to meat Are you happy? In vain This is just a 700-kilogram bull from Bangladesh, which will be sacrificed on the Muslim holiday of Kurban Bayram. And he got such a buzz thanks to his hairstyle, reminiscent of Trump's hairstyle.
description_en: "Donald Trump" will soon be put to meat Are you happy? In vain This is just a 700-kilogram bull from Bangladesh, which will be sacrificed on the Muslim holiday of Kurban Bayram. And he got such a buzz thanks to his hairstyle, reminiscent of Trump's hairstyle.
description_uk: "Дональда Трампа" скоро пустят на мясо Обрадовались? Зря. Это всего лишь 700-килограммовый бычок из Бангладеш, которого на мусульманский праздник Курбан-байрам принесут в жертву. А такую кликуху он получил благодаря своей прическе, напоминающей укладку Трампа.
